_meta.rule: Sim layer compiles ONLY event-driven EffectSpec entries (21 sim triggers). All passive / aura / while-on-field / turn-gated continuous logic lives in V2 (effectSpecV2.continuous → ContinuousManager.refold + continuousHandlers) and is mirrored in v2-continuous-eb01-eb02-batch1.json.

covered_by_v2_continuous.note: Continuous aura: +1000 Counter on Land-of-Wano chars without printed counter. (Card also has a [When Attacking] sim-event clause that the original compile did not emit; sim re-compile for that clause is a follow-up.)
V2 grants printed [Rush] keyword. Sim handles [When Attacking] separately (see cards[]) — coexistence is intended.
V2 grants printed [Blocker]. Card remains UNSUPPORTED for sim [DON x2][When Attacking] (sim-spec 'up to 1' quantifier missing).
Entire effect is continuous: +1000/3-rested-DON during own turn while ≥1 DON attached. No sim-event clauses remain.
V2 grants printed [Blocker]. Card has no other clauses.
Entire effect is continuous: aura_power_buff +1000 on own SMILE chars while hand ≤ 4.
V2 handles continuous '+1000 per 2 events in trash' (gated by leader-has-type:Baroque Works). Sim [On Play] DRAW 2 + TRASH_HAND 1 not yet compiled — see UNSUPPORTED entry.
V2 grants printed [Blocker]. Sim [On Opp Attack] still UNSUPPORTED (DON-cost-reduction, OPT, ramp-DON, LEADER_HAS_TRAIT).
V2 grants printed [Rush]. Sim [On K.O.] still UNSUPPORTED (ramp-DON-from-deck-rested, LEADER_HAS_TRAIT).
V2 grants printed [Blocker]. Sim [On Play] still UNSUPPORTED (choose_one, look-at-opp-life-and-reorder, turn-all-own-life-face-down).
V2 grants printed [Blocker]. Sim [On Play] still UNSUPPORTED ('up to 1' KO quantifier).
V2 grants printed [Blocker]. Sim [On K.O.] (by-opp-effect) still UNSUPPORTED (ON_KO source filter, ADD_LIFE on self).
Entire effect is continuous: +2000 while ≥1 DON attached, own turn, life ≤ 2.
V2 handles continuous +2000 on opp-turn while ≥2 DON attached. Sim [On Play] still UNSUPPORTED (OPT, GIVE_DON_REST_TO_TARGET, LEADER_HAS_TRAIT).
Entire effect is two continuous entries: +2000 own turn, −2000 opp turn.
Entire effect is continuous: gain [Blocker] while Sarfunkel is on field.
V2 handles continuous rush_character grant while opp has ≥2 chars. Sim [On Play] still UNSUPPORTED (LEADER_HAS_TRAIT sim-spec gap).
Entire effect is continuous: gain [Blocker] while Merry Go is on field.
V2 grants printed [Blocker]. Sim [On K.O.] still UNSUPPORTED (DON-cost-reduction, search-and-conditionally-add-from-looked-at-subset).
